/usr/bin/clang++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX26.4.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=12.0 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/DiskClientSmokeTest.dir/DiskClientSmokeTest_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DiskClientSmokeTest.dir/tests/smoke_test.cpp.o -o DiskClientSmokeTest -F/Users/jaegerproxima/Qt/6.11.1/macos/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/jaegerproxima/Qt/6.11.1/macos/lib /Users/jaegerproxima/Qt/6.11.1/macos/lib/QtNetwork.framework/Versions/A/QtNetwork /Users/jaegerproxima/Qt/6.11.1/macos/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
